experiment_1_frozen_embedding.description: TFLE all layers, K=1, T=0.001, embedding frozen
experiment_1_frozen_embedding.conclusion: TFLE flips themselves cause degradation, not embedding co-adaptation

experiment_2_output_layer_only.description: TFLE output layer only, K=1, T=0.001, embedding lr=1e-5
experiment_2_output_layer_only.conclusion: Output-layer TFLE IMPROVES performance. Viable path for GRPO.

root_cause: Multi-layer flips cause cascading input distribution shifts. Layer N+1 was trained for layer N's old output distribution. Changing layer N corrupts the signal for all subsequent layers.
recommendation: For handoff: freeze hidden layers, TFLE on output projection only. For pretraining: all-layer TFLE works because layers co-adapt.
